channel.title: briefUpdatesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: British police arrest Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor on suspicion of misconduct
item.description: British police confirmed that Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor -- formerly known as Prince Andrew -- was arrested on Thursday on suspicion of misconduct in ...

item.title: WATCH: Avalanche coats skiers waiting in line for chair lift
item.description: Eyewitness video shows the moment dust from an avalanche engulfs skiers waiting for a chair lift in a ski resort in Italy.

item.title: Snow drought helped set the stage for deadly California avalanche, leading to unstable conditions
FBI in touch with Mexico about Nancy Guthrie's disappearance, sources say
item.description: The FBI has been in touch with the Mexican government and Mexican law enforcement regarding the disappearance of Nancy Guthrie, law enforcement source...

item.title: U.N. nuclear chief warns of 2 major risks if U.S.-Iran deal not reached
item.description: The head of the U.N. nuclear watchdog agency says Iran's enriched uranium "is still there," as he stresses the urgency of diplomacy to avert a U.S.-Ir...

item.title: Scores of U.S. warplanes head for key bases amid standoff with Iran
item.description: As Trump pressures Iran, he's spoken of an "armada" heading for the Mideast, but there's another massive movement of American fire power in the air.

item.title: 2nd US carrier group heads toward Middle East amid Iran tensions
item.description: A second American aircraft carrier -- the USS Gerald R. Ford -- is heading toward the Middle East amid rising tensions with Iran, accompanied by destr...

item.title: Skiers with roots in Lake Tahoe’s alpine community among the 8 killed in California avalanche
item.description: The victims of a deadly avalanche in California’s Sierra Nevada include a group connected to a skiing academy near Lake Tahoe.

item.title: Former Prince Andrew arrested over Epstein files revelations
item.description: Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor, King Charles III's younger brother, has been arrested over suspected misconduct in public office after revelations in the ...

item.title: US applications for jobless aid fall to 206,000 last week as layoffs remain low
item.description: U.S. applications for unemployment benefits fell last week as layoffs remain at historically low levels

item.title: WATCH: British police arrest former Prince Andrew on suspicion of misconduct
item.description: British police confirmed that Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor -- formerly known as Prince Andrew -- was arrested on Thursday on suspicion of misconduct in ...

item.title: Men wrongfully accused of yogurt shop murders seek formal exoneration
item.description: One of the four men who was initially convicted was sent to death row in the killing of four teenagers in a crime that haunted Austin for decades.

item.title: The backcountry ski trip hit by avalanche was led by an outfit offering mountain adventures globally
